DHS badge
fetch_files()
Get files from the malariaverse site file server.
fetch_site()
Fetch a site file for a country from the malariaverse site file server.

Recursively filter site file elements

IRS insecticide efficacy parameters

net_efficacy

Plot population at risk by age group over time

Plot intervention coverage over time

Plot pyrethroid resistance over time
plot_site_diagnostic()
Create a site diagnostic report
plot_site_interventions()
Plot interventions from a site object
plot_site_map()
Plot a site's admin unit highlighted on a map
plot_site_prevalence()
Plot site prevalence over time
plot_vector_species()
Plot vector species characteristics as faceted horizontal bars

Age group colour palette
site_model_distribution_to_usage()
Convert model input distributions to expected ITN usage

site_usage_to_model_distribution()
Convert ITN usage to model input distributions
